logic_delta.intent: F1: Project bootstrap, tooling config, hashes directory, and grammar formalization
F2: YAML compiler + Effect TS runtime MVP — schema, parser, compiler, runtime, SSR, Vite plugin
F2.5: Magic value extraction — EiderConstValues via Effect.Config, eliminated all hardcoded strings from compiler/parser/runtime
F3: Hash shards for directives (v-for, v-if, v-model, v-show, v-bind), Tailwind scanner, scoped CSS injector, morphdom patcher, eider.config — FMCF Track 2 complete
F4: YAML normalizer (smart key joining, multi-line template key preservation), 7 real-world .eider.yaml examples, full-spectrum Tailwind regex
F5: Runtime completeness — filters.ts (13 built-ins), scope.ts expr-eval rewrite (|| ternary rewrite), template.compiler text:/v-else/v-else-if, runtime.test.ts (4671 tests passing)
F6: Registry sync (filters.hash.md, local.map.json, atlas.graph updated to 0x5), public API exports (createScope, applyFilters, splitPipeExpr, getFilters), example integration tests (7 specimens)
F7: SSR hash shards (render.hash.md, hydrate.hash.md), AppSchema inline components[] support, app.runtime self-contained compilation, ssr.test.ts integration tests
F8: New directives (v-once, v-pre, v-memo, v-cloak), directive validation (throws on unknown), static-content.eider.yaml example, 4942 tests passing
F9: Directives finalization (v-text, v-html, v-on, v-slot), native Vue modifier matching, dynamic slot parameters support
F10: Component Communication (emits, provide, inject) parity with Vue Composition API
Refactored Reactivity Scope to use deep Proxy intercepts and with() evaluations for async actions
F11: Framework Parity (Vue built-in tags and global plugins mapped + rigorous TS compliance)
